scope_boundary: Repository claim/evidence mechanics plus one public-safe synthesis of six related local historical projects as a single implementation lineage. No project capability path was reproduced, no independent confirmation is created, and no AI capability, source-interpretation, benchmark, safety, or test-backed chapter-core claim is promoted.
transition_reason: The repository demonstrates claim labels, support states, source mappings, passage-reviewed mapping counts, validators, and now an evidence-cell record that exposes origin, method, independence, causal-chain state, trainable-state identity, response causality, honest missingness, and ownership/capability separation across one six-project local lineage. That improves the argument and its negative controls, but it does not reproduce the projects, complete a checkpoint-to-response causal chain, prove semantic adequacy, or justify moving the chapter core claim above argument.
required_artifacts: independent review of source interpretation adequacy
recorded proof/test/source artifacts for any stronger support state
a claim-scoped same-lineage causal chain with actually updated state, runtime output, and outcome-linked independent evaluation
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_cells.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_transitions.py
negative_results: all 54 chapter core claims remain at argument
no support-state promotion is accepted by this pilot
a missing causal stage is rejected
missing evidence labeled passed is rejected
ownership used as capability is rejected
updated state without a trainable classification and receipt is rejected
the six-project fixture records an incomplete checkpoint-to-response chain
downgrade_triggers: missing evidence-transition record for a moved claim
local project lineage described as independent replication
ownership or interface presence described as task capability
missing causal links omitted or serialized as passed
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after claim-specific review shows that the support-state discipline is not merely present as a repository process but accepted as evidence for the exact scoped claim.
limitations: process mechanics do not prove source interpretation adequacy
passage-reviewed mappings do not by themselves promote claims
schema and validator passes are not behavioral tests of an AI system
the six projects share lineage and were not independently reproduced
the fixture does not complete the checkpoint-to-response causal chain
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent external audit
non_claims: does not promote any chapter claim
does not prove source interpretation is correct
does not prove any AI capability or safety property
does not turn six related local projects into independent confirmations
does not authorize publication of raw private project material
